summary: Backend-only testing of Luna Group Stripe enforcement + 10pts/$1 changes. 18/18 tests PASSED in /app/backend/tests/test_stripe_enforcement_points.py. All P0 flows (paid subscription, table deposit, bottle pre-order) correctly return Stripe checkout_url for NEW users. DEV_MODE bypass (luna@test.com) activates instantly and awards points at 10pts/$1. Leaderboard and all regression endpoints healthy.

minor.issue: Correct path is /api/loyalty/points/award (not /api/loyalty/award). Frontend & docs should match.

critical_code_review_comments: routes/bookings.py line ~195: DEV_MODE branch issues payment_intent_id 'pi_dev_...' without calling Stripe — acceptable for luna@test.com only; confirm frontend handles both {dev_mode, payment_intent_id} and {checkout_url, session_id} response shapes.

routes/subscriptions.py: DEV_MODE subscribe passes amount_spent=price to award_points() but the internal multiplier there uses existing subscription. When user upgrades bronze->silver via dev path, the silver sub is inserted first then points computed based on newly-active silver tier (1.5x). This awards 600 pts (base 400 + 200 bonus). If design expects base only (400), re-evaluate.

routes/payments.py process_successful_payment() subscription branch creates a NEW subscription instead of updating the 'pending' state. Ensure webhook cancels any pre-existing active sub before inserting — currently does via update_many (good).

routes/bookings.py bottle-preorder: On Stripe path, bottle_orders row is created with status=pending BEFORE Stripe success. Good — webhook flips to confirmed. Ensure reconciliation job cleans up stale 'pending' orders if user abandons checkout.
config POINTS_PER_DOLLAR=10 is used consistently across bookings, payments.process_successful_payment, and loyalty.points/award — verified.
test_credentials: luna@test.com / test123 (DEV_MODE). Stripe-enforced tests auto-register throwaway users stripetest_<hex>@lunatest.com / Test123!.
seed_data_creation: Each test run registers 1 fresh user via /api/auth/register for Stripe flows. Test data prefix: 'stripetest_'. Created a bronze sub, 1-2 table_bookings, 1 bottle_order for the new user. luna@test.com received 1 silver subscription, 1 confirmed table booking, 1 confirmed bottle order with points awarded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_stripe_enforcement_points.py. Stripe key is real test-mode via emergentintegrations — checkout_url is live Stripe URL (checkout.stripe.com). Webhook flow was NOT end-to-end tested (would require Stripe CLI or completing payment on hosted page). Payload assertions cover success=true, requires_payment=true, checkout_url present, session_id starts with cs_, no pi_demo_xxx, no dev_mode for new users. DEV bypass verified for luna@test.com across all 3 flows with exact 10pts/$1 math. Leaderboard backend returns 200 with leaders array.
rca of the issue: N/A — no issues found. Previous iteration bugs (Stripe bypass, 1pt/$1, leaderboard backend path) are all resolved per this test suite.
